runtimeBehaviorChangeScope: Future unapproved test detail pages without backend/CMS authority fail closed for metadata, FAQ, CTA, and FAQPage JSON-LD fallback; existing approved test detail pages retain compatibility fallback.

newTestGuard.rule: A new test detail surface without backend/CMS authority cannot inherit frontend metadata, FAQ, CTA, or FAQPage JSON-LD fallback.

rows.currentOwner: backend seo.surface.v1 or scale lookup when present; approved compatibility wrapper otherwise
rows.failsClosedWhen: slug is not approved and seo title/description authority is missing
runtimeEvidence: missing metadata authority noindexes unapproved new test detail pages

rows.currentOwner: content_i18n_json FAQ when present; approved compatibility wrapper otherwise
rows.desiredOwner: answer_surface_v1 or CMS/scale visible FAQ authority
rows.failsClosedWhen: slug is not approved and visible FAQ authority is missing
runtimeEvidence: mergedFaq becomes empty for unapproved test detail pages without visible FAQ authority
FAQ section renders only when mergedFaq has visible items

rows.runtimeGuard: faqJsonLd is null when mergedFaq is empty
rows.compatibilityAllowance: FAQPage JSON-LD only mirrors visible mergedFaq
rows.failsClosedWhen: no visible FAQ items are rendered
runtimeEvidence: JsonLd id test-faq renders only when faqJsonLd is not null
faqJsonLd is built only from mergedFaq

rows.currentOwner: landing_surface_v1 when present; approved compatibility wrapper otherwise
rows.failsClosedWhen: slug is not approved and landing_surface_v1 CTA authority is missing
runtimeEvidence: generic start CTA renders only when canRenderStartCta is true
CTASticky renders only when testDetailAuthority.cta.allowed is true
